since_last: 51% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +0.22%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 51% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC -0.52% · Gold -1.35% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 51% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +0.22%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +0.22%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.28%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at -1.79%
cards.body: Leaders: CHKP +1.72%, MU +1.58%, CGNX +1.41%, VRT +1.13%, SNAP +1.07%. Laggards: SPCX -1.79%, PUBM -1.77%, RXRX -1.55%, MGNI -1.01%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.79% at $181.69
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.79% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
